meta.title: Countries & Capitals
meta.subject: general
meta.description: Travel the world! Learn which city is the capital of each country.

items.front: 🇫🇷 What is the capital of France?
items.back:
Paris 🗼

Paris is the capital of France. It is famous for the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre museum, and delicious croissants!

items.front: 🇯🇵 What is the capital of Japan?
items.back:
Tokyo 🏯

Tokyo is the capital of Japan and one of the most populous cities in the world. Japan is known for sushi, anime, and samurai history.

items.front: 🇧🇷 What is the capital of Brazil?
items.back:
Brasília 🌿

Brasília is the capital of Brazil. It was purpose-built as a new capital city in 1960. Brazil is famous for the Amazon rainforest and carnival.

items.front: 🇦🇺 What is the capital of Australia?
items.back:
Canberra 🦘

Canberra is the capital of Australia — not Sydney! It was chosen as a compromise between Sydney and Melbourne. Australia is home to kangaroos and koalas.
items.hint: Not Sydney! Think of a compromise city

items.front: 🇪🇬 What is the capital of Egypt?
items.back:
Cairo 🏛️

Cairo is the capital of Egypt. It is one of the oldest cities in the world and sits near the famous ancient pyramids of Giza.

items.front: 🇨🇳 What is the capital of China?
items.back:
Beijing 🐉

Beijing is the capital of China. It is home to the Forbidden City and is the starting point of the Great Wall of China.

South America 🌎

Brazil is the largest country in South America. It covers nearly half the continent and is home to the world's largest rainforest, the Amazon.

items.front: 🇬🇧 What is the capital of the United Kingdom?
items.back:
London 🎡

London is the capital of the United Kingdom. It is home to Buckingham Palace, the Tower of London, and the famous red double-decker buses!
items.hint: Home of the red double-decker bus

items.front: 🇮🇳 What is the capital of India?
items.back:
New Delhi 🕌

New Delhi is the capital of India. India is the world's most populous country and the birthplace of chess and the number zero!

items.front: 🇿🇦 What is the capital of South Africa?
items.back:
Pretoria (administrative) 🦁

South Africa has three capitals! Pretoria (executive), Cape Town (legislative), and Bloemfontein (judicial). It's unique in the world!

items.question: What is the capital of France?
items.explanation: Paris is the capital of France, famous for the Eiffel Tower and Louvre museum.

items.question: What is the capital of Japan?
items.explanation: Tokyo is the capital of Japan and one of the world's most populated cities.
items.hint: One of the world's largest cities

items.question: What is the capital of the United Kingdom?
items.explanation: London is the capital of the United Kingdom, home to Buckingham Palace.

items.question: What is the capital of Australia?
items.explanation: Canberra is Australia's capital — not Sydney! It was chosen as a compromise.
items.hint: It's not the most famous Australian city

items.question: What is the capital of the United States?
items.explanation: Washington D.C. is the US capital. New York is the largest city but not the capital.

items.question: What is the capital of India?
items.explanation: New Delhi is the capital of India. Mumbai is the financial capital but not the official capital.

items.question: What is the capital of China?
items.explanation: Beijing is China's capital, home to the Great Wall and the Forbidden City.

items.question: What is the capital of Brazil?
items.explanation: Brasília is the capital, not Rio de Janeiro! It was built as a new capital city in 1960.
items.hint: A specially designed city, not the famous beach city

items.question: What is the capital of Egypt?
items.explanation: Cairo is Egypt's capital, located near the ancient pyramids of Giza.

items.question: What is the capital of Canada?
items.explanation: Ottawa is Canada's capital — not Toronto, which is just the largest city.

items.question: What is the capital of Germany?
items.explanation: Berlin is the capital of Germany. It is famous for the Brandenburg Gate.

items.question: What is the capital of Italy?
items.explanation: Rome is the capital of Italy, often called the Eternal City. It's home to the Colosseum.
items.hint: The Eternal City with the Colosseum

items.question: What is the capital of Russia?
items.explanation: Moscow is Russia's capital and largest city, home to the Kremlin and Red Square.
items.hint: Home of the Kremlin and Red Square

items.question: What is the capital of Argentina?
items.explanation: Buenos Aires is Argentina's capital, known as the birthplace of the tango dance.

items.question: What is the capital of Nigeria?
items.explanation: Abuja is Nigeria's capital. Lagos is the largest city but Abuja was built as the capital.

items.question: What is the capital of South Korea?
items.explanation: Seoul is South Korea's capital, a massive tech-forward city home to Samsung and LG.

items.question: What is the capital of Mexico?
items.explanation: Mexico City is one of the largest cities in the world and the capital of Mexico.
items.hint: One of the world's largest cities

items.question: What is the capital of Kenya?
items.explanation: Nairobi is Kenya's capital and is known as the 'Green City in the Sun'.
items.hint: The Green City in the Sun

items.question: What is the capital of Spain?
items.explanation: Madrid is Spain's capital. Barcelona is famous but Madrid is the official capital.

items.question: What is the capital of Thailand?
items.explanation: Bangkok is Thailand's capital. It has one of the longest official city names in the world!
items.hint: City with the world's longest official name
